name: The Hidden Hands of the Shadow Puppeteer

system.description:
Discipline: None
Skill: Talent (Shadow Puppetry)
Type: Normal
Qi: 10

You send out thin lines of Qi that find the meridian lines of your foes and allow you to control their actions. Make a Talent (Shadow Puppetry) Skill roll against the Evade of your targets. On a success you control their actions for 2 rounds. On a Total Success you control their actions for 4 rounds. Ten targets, plus an additional target per rank of Qi that you posses, may be affected. This technique can only affect individuals with 2 ranks of Qi or less, and all targets must be within a 500-foot area.
system.source: Wandering Heroes of Ogre Gate, Chapter 3: Kung Fu Techniques
system.targetEffects: User controls target actions for 2 rounds
system.totalSuccessTargetEffects: User controls target actions for 4 rounds
system.targetEffectsNote: Affects targets with 2 Qi Ranks or less within the listed area and target count.
